message:
feat(fnp): port maximum/minimum from NumPy passthrough to native Rust

- Add pub fn maximum() and minimum() to fnp-ufunc with NaN-propagating semantics
- Add native_binary_maximum_or_passthrough/minimum helpers for kwarg fallback
- Update fnp-python maximum/minimum bindings to use native for simple cases
- Add conformance_maximum_minimum.rs harness with 16 oracle tests covering:
  - Basic arrays and NaN-propagating behavior (vs fmax/fmin NaN-ignoring)
  - Inf handling
  - Broadcasting (2D and scalar)
  - 50+ random inputs
  - Explicit comparison tests showing maximum vs fmax NaN difference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
